item.label: [PKT-DSC-003](task-0160): Approval Publishing/Response Handling
item.summary: Implement Discord approval publishing and response handling

body:
# Description

Cancelled by the 2026-04 pre-ACP archive pass. The Discord overlay line was superseded and archived.


# [PKT-DSC-003](task-0149): Approval Publishing/Response Handling

## Purpose

Implement Discord approval publishing and response handling.

## Scope

- Approval format
- Publishing logic
- Response handling

## Implementation

1. Define format
2. Implement publishing
3. Add response handling

## Acceptance Criteria

1. Format defined
2. Publishing works
3. Responses handled
